rulings.Case Title: DAVID POST VS. REDFIN CORPORATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 25, 2019 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT ANDREW WARREN, VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT continued to August 16, 2019 on Court's own motion. If parties agree on a different date for a hearing (after August 16, 2019), parties may jointly notify the Court to avoid an appearance solely for the purpose of contesting the new hearing date. The notification may be provided to department 501 at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org no later than 8:00 a.m. on July 25, 2019. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: KIM SZELOG VS. KYBA THAI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 25, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT CHAU VO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default Judgment OFF CALENDAR. No valid Proof of Service on file. Specifically, no Proof of Service by the messenger. No indication that Juliet Mushet (Proof of service on file) has personal knowledge of hand delivery by "message service." = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ALEMANY HOUSING ASSOCIATES, L.P. VS. MARIA CAMPBELL ET AL
